messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0174",
  "title": "致谢& 报告说明 SPECIAL THANKS & REPORT DESCRIPTION",
  "page_index": 99,
  "page_range": "99-102"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0175",
    "title": "特别鸣谢 （按照首字母顺序排序）",
    "page_range": "102",
    "summary": "This section serves as a heading for an acknowledgments list. It can answer questions regarding the document's acknowledgment topic and the alphabetical sorting structure used for thanked individuals or organizations. It does not contain retrievable information on specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types."
  }
]

message.content: This section (pages 99–102) covers the "Special Thanks & Report Description" topic, focusing on an acknowledgments list organized alphabetically by thanked individuals or organizations. It supports retrieval of information regarding the document's acknowledgment topic and the alphabetical sorting structure applied to contributors. The section does not contain specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
